value.rationale: The claim states Anthropic offers "Connect" from other surfaces (desktop app, VS Code, web, Claude.ai). The page is about connecting Claude Code to tools via MCP. While it mentions claude.ai connectors and the Anthropic Directory, it does not describe a "Connect" feature/offering accessible from a desktop app, VS Code, web, or Claude.ai surfaces. There is no mention of any "Connect" offering across those surfaces.
